per_record_audit.metadata_title: Flexx Pre Shred | PreWorkout Powder Supplement for Strong and Lean Physique, Energy, Pumps, Fat Burning, Focus | Arctic Ice Berry, 30 Servings
per_record_audit.inserted_content_preview:
Loaded with caffeine

Flavor is good, easy to mix and is totally soluble. I am deducting a star because I found my heart racing too strongly and honestly I cut the scoop in half for my next workout an
per_record_audit.reconstructed_full_text_preview: Flavor is good, easy to mix and is totally soluble. I am deducting a star because I found my heart racing too strongly and honestly I cut the scoop in half for my next workout and it did seem better (although the benefits were also cut in half). Anyway, if you like working out with energy drinks (like Monster) than this preworkout mix will be for you. I will let me son try it next time he is visiting, but this wasn't really a good workout drink for me.
sufficiency_reasons: truncation ratio 0.50 — inserted has useful signal but full review materially adds context
per_record_audit.recommended_action: use as-is for a small dry-run; consider full-text companion in Phase 8.5C.4 if persona quality is marginal

per_record_audit.metadata_title: C4 Energy Carbonated Zero Sugar Energy Drink, Pre Workout Drink + Beta Alanine, Sparkling Tropical Blast, 16 Fl Oz (Pack of 12)
per_record_audit.inserted_content_preview:
I had problems with taking this, but might not have the same effect on others.

Didn't really work for me. Not sure if it was the caffeine or the niacin, but I didn't like the way I felt after drinkin
per_record_audit.reconstructed_full_text_preview: Didn't really work for me. Not sure if it was the caffeine or the niacin, but I didn't like the way I felt after drinking this. I had it about 1/2 an hour before the gym and I found my heart racing and my fingers tingling when I began the treadmill. Although, in reading other reviews here, apparently it does the trick for others, so far be it from me to rate this less than three stars. I will say I liked the flavor and the fact that it is zero calories and does have some endurance nutrients in it. Just didn't sit well with my body and I was afraid to try any more. Might work well for others.
sufficiency_reasons: truncation ratio 0.35 — full review has materially richer evidence; preview alone weakens persona quality
per_record_audit.recommended_action: do NOT use this row alone for persona build; insert a full-text companion source_record in Phase 8.5C.4 with metadata.supersedes_preview_source_record_id set to this row's id

per_record_audit.metadata_title: AWAKE - Caffeinated Chocolate Bites - Coffee Alternative - Low Calorie Snacks - Bite Size Energy Bars - 50mg of Caffeine in Each Bite - Non GMO - Low Carb - Gluten Free - Caramel Chocolate - 30 Bites
per_record_audit.inserted_content_preview:
Great alternative to coffee, tea or diet cola drinks

I was looking for something I could have in the middle of the day that would give me an extra boost without having to drink a cup of coffee or tea
per_record_audit.reconstructed_full_text_preview: I was looking for something I could have in the middle of the day that would give me an extra boost without having to drink a cup of coffee or tea. These energy bites do fit what I was looking for. They are larger than I was expecting and they are convenient to keep in my handbag.  As for the flavor, they are ok. I am not a big gooey caramel lover, probably would have preferred these in more of a chocolate flavor or even a fruit flavored gummy. They are great in a pinch and I have been using them for almost 3 weeks now on an almost daily basis. No more coffee breath, these are far easier to ha
